---
title: '2014/04/10 Journal'
date: '2014-04-10T16:47:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6748475610507266558'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/whats-up-i-am-getting-ready-for-wells.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
I am getting ready for Wells Fargo Dealer Services Interview. It's a panel interview. That makes me nervous just a bit. I need to bring 4-5 copies of my resume? Oh my!<br />
<br />
I wanted the TDA job more, but that has gone MIA.<br />
<br />
I'll do my best in this interview. The job sounds fun. I just wish they were out here in Alliance.<br />
<br />
Mom (debbie) is sending a camera for Connor to take on his trip to camp. He's become QUITE the picture taker. He has great talent for it. I wouldn't be surprised if that becomes a hobby, if not a profession, for him very early. What's cool about that is that he could make a living from it very early on. Get his online business started NOW!<br />
<br />
<br />
&nbsp;dw<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
